info.name: ResumeRAG v2 API
info.description:
Complete API collection for ResumeRAG v2 — AI-powered resume-to-job matching platform.

Setup:
1. Set `base_url` to your server (default: http://localhost:8000)
2. Run 'Auth / Signup' or 'Auth / Login' — the access_token is captured automatically.
3. All protected routes use the {{access_token}} variable injected by the login test script.

variable.description: Backend base URL. Change to your Render deployment URL in production.
JWT access token. Auto-populated by the signup/login post-scripts.
UUID of the most recently uploaded resume. Auto-populated by upload post-script.
UUID of a match result. Manually paste from GET /matches response.

request.description:
Liveness probe. No auth required.

Expected response (200):
{
  "status": "ok",
  "timestamp": "2025-01-15T12:00:00.000Z",
  "version": "2.0.0"
}

Register a new account.

Expected response (201):
{
  "access_token": "<jwt>",
  "refresh_token": "<jwt>",
  "token_type": "bearer"
}

Errors:
- 400: Email already registered
- 422: Password < 8 chars or invalid email

Authenticate with email + password.

Expected response (200):
{
  "access_token": "<jwt>",
  "refresh_token": "<jwt>",
  "token_type": "bearer"
}

Errors:
- 401: Invalid email or password

formdata.description: Select a PDF resume from your machine (max 5MB).

request.description:
Upload a PDF resume. Validates magic bytes (not extension).

Expected response (201):
{
  "resume_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "char_count": 3241
}

Errors:
- 400: Not a valid PDF (magic byte check failed)
- 413: File exceeds 5MB
- 422: Scanned/image PDF with no extractable text

Calls Groq (Llama 3.3 70B) to extract structured profile from resume text.
Result is cached in the DB — subsequent /match calls reuse it.

Expected response (200):
{
  "skills": ["Python", "FastAPI", "PostgreSQL"],
  "experience_years": 4,
  "job_titles": ["Backend Engineer", "Software Developer"],
  "summary": "Backend engineer with 4 years building APIs."
}

Errors:
- 404: resume_id not found
- 403: Resume belongs to another user
- 502: Groq API unavailable

Full AI pipeline: profile extraction → Adzuna job fetch → MiniLM embeddings → FAISS ranking.
Rate limited to 10 requests/hour per IP.

Expected response (200):
{
  "profile": {
    "skills": ["Python", "FastAPI"],
    "experience_years": 4,
    "job_titles": ["Backend Engineer"],
    "summary": "..."
  },
  "matches": [
    {
      "title": "Senior Python Developer",
      "company": "TechCorp",
      "location": "Remote, US",
      "url": "https://...",
      "description": "...",
      "salary_min": 100000,
      "salary_max": 140000,
      "score": 89.3
    }
  ]
}

Errors:
- 404: resume_id not found
- 403: Resume belongs to another user
- 429: Rate limit exceeded (10/hour)

Returns paginated match history scoped to the current user.
total reflects filtered count, not raw table size.

Expected response (200):
{
  "total": 42,
  "page": 1,
  "limit": 10,
  "results": [
    {
      "id": "<uuid>",
      "job_title": "Senior Python Developer",
      "company": "TechCorp",
      "url": "https://...",
      "score": 89.3,
      "created_at": "2025-01-15T12:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}

Permanently deletes a match result. Only the owning user may delete.

Expected response: 204 No Content (empty body)

Errors:
- 400: Invalid UUID format
- 403: Match belongs to another user
- 404: Match not found
